blocks.text: `cmd/riido daemon ...` composes provider adapters, runtime actors, supervisor, and control-plane adapters into one local process.

items: The local daemon exposes status, health, ready, and metrics JSON on the local IPC endpoint.
It owns lifecycle wiring, runtime actor startup, and local socket readiness.
Provider CLI bundling, server HTTP/SSE, Terraform/AWS/deploy evidence, and private machine state remain outside this context.
